title: cephalomanes auriculatum
intro: Cephalomanes auriculatum, a rare and endemic fern species found in the Philippines, is a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Cephalomanes auriculatum is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Cephalomanes auriculatum is often used in traditional remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and treat various ailments.
